vulnerabilities.title: ejs lacks certain pollution protection
vulnerabilities.description: The ejs (aka Embedded JavaScript templates) package before 3.1.10 for Node.js lacks certain pollution protection.

vulnerabilities.title: mde ejs vulnerable to XSS
vulnerabilities.description: nodejs ejs version older than 2.5.5 is vulnerable to a Cross-site-scripting in the `ejs.renderFile()` resulting in code injection

vulnerabilities.title: ejs vulnerable to DoS due to weak input validation
vulnerabilities.description: nodejs ejs version older than 2.5.5 is vulnerable to a denial-of-service due to weak input validation in `ejs.renderFile()`

vulnerabilities.title: ejs is vulnerable to remote code execution due to weak input validation
vulnerabilities.description: nodejs ejs versions older than 2.5.3 is vulnerable to remote code execution due to weak input validation in `ejs.renderFile()` function

vulnerabilities.title: ejs template injection vulnerability
vulnerabilities.description: The ejs (aka Embedded JavaScript templates) package 3.1.6 for Node.js allows server-side template injection in settings[view options][outputFunctionName]. This is parsed as an internal option, and overwrites the outputFunctionName option with an arbitrary OS command (which is executed upon template compilation).
